name: Crash Hunter
description: Detect potential crash risks and stability issues in SwiftUI projects without modifying code

project_path.description: Absolute path to SwiftUI project root

stages.task: Scan repository structure and classify files by type (ViewModel, View, Service, Test). Build file index.
Scan ViewModels and services for crash risks: force unwraps (!), unsafe optional handling, missing error handling, async race conditions, data races. Provide line numbers and fixes.
Scan SwiftUI Views for invalid patterns: invalid state bindings, duplicated state sources, uncontrolled .task usage, navigation state inconsistencies, business logic in View bodies.
Audit entire codebase for: MainActor violations, UI updates from background threads, potential memory leaks (retain cycles), unsafe async patterns, @State misuse, forced unwraps in critical paths.
Inspect test coverage: identify missing tests for critical ViewModels, missing UI tests for key flows, and assess overall test quality. If test files exist, analyze gaps.

Aggregate all findings from logic, ui, safety, and test agents. Classify by severity (critical, high, medium, low). Generate prioritized remediation task list with affected files and recommended fixes.

safety_gates.name: no_file_modifications
safety_gates.description: Ensure analysis-only mode did not modify any files

safety_gates.name: all_agents_completed
safety_gates.description: Warn if any agent stage failed
